code: import React,{useContext}from'react';import{CartContext}from'../context/CartContext';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import API from'../services/api';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Checkout=()=>{const _useContext=useContext(CartContext),cartItems=_useContext.cartItems,clearCart=_useContext.clearCart;const navigate=useNavigate();const total=cartItems.reduce((sum,item)=>{const price=item.product.price*(1-(item.product.discount||0)/100);return sum+price*item.qty;},0);const placeOrder=async()=>{try{const orderItems=cartItems.map(i=>({product:i.product._id,qty:i.qty}));await API.post('/orders',{orderItems,total});clearCart();alert('Order placed successfully!');navigate('/');}catch(err){console.error(err);alert('Failed to place order');}};if(cartItems.length===0){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"container my-4",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Your cart is empty."})});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container my-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Checkout"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:"list-group mb-3",children:cartItems.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{className:"list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center",children:[item.product.name," x ",item.qty,/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:["$",(item.product.price*item.qty).toFixed(2)]})]},item.product._id))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h4",{children:["Total: $",total.toFixed(2)]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn-success",onClick:placeOrder,children:"Place Order"})]});};export default Checkout;
